ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  3P LAND HOLDINGS LIMITED has announced a routine book closure from July 24 to August 1, 2026, to determine eligible shareholders for its 61st Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for August 1, 2026. Shareholders must ensure their holdings are registered by July 23rd to participate in the AGM. A minor document clarity issue is noted due to the inclusion of an extraneous NSE scrip code "PDUMJEIND" in the footer, which appears unrelated to 3P Land Holdings' own listings or the book closure intimation.
